description_long: This object is a tall, cylindrical black pot containing a lush arrangement of white calla lilies with long, slender green stems and broad, smooth green leaves. The flowers are trumpet-shaped, each with a creamy white spathe that gently curls outward, revealing a central yellow spadix. The foliage is dense at the base, with leaves radiating outward and upward, providing a vibrant green contrast to the stark white blooms. The pot itself is plain, smooth, and unadorned, with a matte finish that emphasizes the elegance of the plant. The overall composition is symmetrical and well-balanced, making it suitable for decorative purposes in both indoor and outdoor urban environments. No plant identification label or decorative elements are visible on the pot.
description: A tall black cylindrical pot holds a dense bouquet of white calla lilies with long green stems and broad leaves. The arrangement is elegant and visually striking, with smooth, plain surfaces.
description_view_0: Front view shows the full spread of white calla lilies and green leaves radiating from a plain black pot.
description_view_1: This angle highlights the left side, revealing the curvature of the flowers and a slightly denser cluster of leaves on the left.
description_view_2: The rear view displays the back spread of the lilies and leaves, with the pot's cylindrical shape clearly visible.
description_view_3: Right-side view emphasizes the outward arch of the flowers and the even distribution of foliage around the pot.
